subcodes.first_line: O thou seeker after Truth! The question of the Trinity, since the time of His Holiness Christ until now, is the belief of the Christians
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت مسئله تثلیث از بعد از حضرت مسیح الی الان معتقد مسیحیان و تا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as mirror, @the cross and the trinity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Christ; Christianity, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud]
